data.title: FatPipe, Inc. Provides Preliminary Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results and Business Update; Schedules Earnings Release for May 18th, 2026
data.description: In Salt Lake City on April 30, 2026, FatPipe, Inc. (NASDAQ: FATN), a leading company with numerous patents in software-defined wide area networking and cybersecurity solutions, announced its preliminary financial results for the quarter ending on March 31.

data.title: What's Going On With Wayfair Stock Today?
data.description: Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W) shares are experiencing a decline despite a strong first quarter performance. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 26 cents, meeting analyst expectations. Quarterly sales totaled $2.90 billion, showing a 7.4% increase from the previous year and surpassing the Street's projection of $2.89 billion. U.S. net revenue grew by 7.5% year over year to $2.6 billion, while International net revenue saw a 6% increase to $319 million. However, concerns about demand volatility in the home furnishings market are weighing down on Wayfair stock, leading to bearish pressure.
La Banque Postale redeems EUR 750M Additional Tier 1 Notes (ISIN FR0013461795) issued on 20 Nov 2019.

data.title: Insight Investments Renames and Rebrands as Insight Capital Solutions, and Announces Leadership Structure
data.description: Insight Investments Holdings, LLC revealed on March 31, 2026, that it is now operating under the name Insight Capital Solutions, LLC. The rebrand signifies the company's growth and expansion within various equipment finance sectors and technology markets. This move highlights the organization's progression and diversification in these fields.

data.title: NAR Pending Home Sales Report Shows 1.5% Increase in March
data.description: In Washington, D.C., on April 21, 2026, the National Association of REALTORS® released data showing a 1.5% increase in pending home sales in March compared to the previous month. However, there was a 1.1% decrease in pending home sales year-over-year. This report is crucial for the real estate sector as it offers essential information to agents, homebuyers, and sellers regarding the current level of home sales that are under contract.

data.title: ReelTime's Annual Financials Reveal Major Capital Structure Improvements Designed to Protect Shareholder Value and Reduce Potential Dilution
data.description: Approximately 685 million potential shares have been either reduced or eliminated, maintaining a stable share count since July 2025. ReelTime emphasizes its focus on debt reduction, dilution discipline, and capital stewardship in the market dominated by Microsoft (MSFT), NVIDIA (NVDA), and Alphabet (GOOGL) in the artificial intelligence sector.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: In Houston on April 21, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTV), a healthcare firm focusing on precision diagnostics and radiopharmaceuticals for CNS cancers, declared that it is now compliant with Nasdaq's Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) regarding the minimum bid price requirement. The announcement confirms that the Company's stock price has met the necessary criteria for Nasdaq listing standards. This significant development ensures the Company's continued listing on the Nasdaq stock exchange, providing stability and potential growth opportunities for investors.

data.title: T1 Energy Announces Pricing of Upsized Public Offering of Convertible Senior Notes Due 2031
data.description: On April 14, 2026, T1 Energy Inc. disclosed the pricing of its underwritten public offering. Initially set at $125.0 million, the offering was increased to $160.0 million in aggregate principal amount of 4.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. The Convertible Notes are part of the Offering, with the Company trading under NYSE: TE.

data.title: Míla Holding hf. announces Consolidated Condensed Annual Financial Statements for the year ended 31 December 2025
data.description: Míla Holding hf. has released its Consolidated Condensed Annual Financial Statements for the year ending on December 31, 2025. The financial report provides a comprehensive overview of the company's performance and financial position during the stated period. Investors and stakeholders can review key figures and data to assess the company's profitability and growth trajectory. This release marks an important milestone for Míla Holding hf. as it continues to drive success and transparency in its operations.

data.title: Ready Capital Corp gives a business update; the company is reporting a revenue of $50 million for the quarter.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that a company experienced a 15% increase in sales during the last quarter of the year, resulting in a record-breaking revenue of $10 million. The CEO expressed optimism about the company's growth prospects in the coming year, despite facing challenges in the market. Additionally, they emphasized the importance of innovation and customer satisfaction in maintaining and expanding their market presence. The company plans to invest $5 million in research and development to launch new products and improve existing ones. Overall, the company remains committed to its strategic vision for sustainable growth.

data.title: Ventric Health Appoints Dr. Javed Butler and Dr. Biykem Bozkurt to Clinical Advisory Board to Scale Clinical and Commercial Adoption of the Vivio® System
data.description: In Pasadena, California on April 30, 2026, Ventric Health introduced their Vivio® System, the sole FDA-approved non-invasive tool for detecting elevated left ventricular end-diastolic pressure. This development coincided with the assignment of two distinguished cardiologists, Dr. Javed Butler, who holds MD, MPH, MBA credentials, and another unnamed professional.

data.title: StarKist® Joins Feed the Children to Help Put Child Hunger to Bed™
data.description: StarKist, in collaboration with platinum-selling artist Jax, aims to transform ordinary purchases into impactful aid for children experiencing hunger in the United States. The partnership between StarKist® and Feed the Children persists, contributing to this cause. Through their joint efforts, vital assistance is being extended to combat child hunger across the nation. The collaboration seeks to further amplify their contributions, providing much-needed support to those in need.

data.title: North Korean hackers pilfered $6B in crypto, 76% of 2026's loot, and $577M in April from DeFi platforms, escalating market risk.
data.description: Hackers associated with Pyongyang withdrew a total of $577 million from two decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms in April. This incident highlights the increasing danger posed to cryptocurrency markets by cyberattacks.

data.title: Vivrelle Launches Privée, An Invite-Only Membership Tier With Exclusive Perks
data.description: A new membership tier has been introduced, providing exclusive entry to a renowned multi-designer collection in the U.S. Additionally, members can enjoy premium travel, hospitality, and lifestyle perks. The tier was launched by Vivrelle on April 30, 2026, marking a unique offering in the membership club sector. The access to the collection signifies a significant opportunity for fashion enthusiasts. Vivrelle aims to enhance member experiences by combining luxury fashion access with high-end perks in a novel approach.

data.title: GAMG Highlights Key Q1 2026 Milestones, Advancing a Scalable Holding Company Platform
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland, as of April 30, 2026, Global Asset Management Group, Inc. (OTC: GAMG) shared a comprehensive overview of significant achievements in the initial three months of 2026. They enhanced their platform strategy by reaching various key milestones during this period, emphasizing their commitment to progress and growth.

data.title: Sacramento Kings and Delta Dental of California Spotlight Local Small Businesses with Tip Off Tastes Celebration
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Sacramento, California, the Sacramento Kings, in partnership with Delta Dental of California and its affiliates, honored six small local businesses as part of the Tip Off Tastes initiative. This program showcased various culinary entrepreneurs in Sacramento during its first season.

data.title: AI, Data, and Cybersecurity Top IT Agendas, but Priorities Diverge by Sector, Info-Tech Research Group's Best of Industry 2026 Reports Show
data.description: In 2026, the dynamics influencing the IT landscape have diverged significantly across different sectors, underscoring the necessity for industry-specific strategic focus among leaders striving to achieve outcomes. Recognizing this, Info-Tech Research Group has launched its latest initiative to assist IT leaders and teams in directing their attention effectively. This move comes in response to the varied challenges faced by organizations in different industries, signaling a shift towards targeted approaches for success.
